title: Music from all versions(Main menu)
description: All versions' menu music – all in one pack!
body:
# Music from all versions(Main menu)
🎵All game music versions included. Listen to every menu theme in this pack!
## 📃Pack song list(latest):
- Infinite Amethyst
- Wending
- Left to loom
- Stand Tall
- Firebugs
- Aerie
- Labyrinthine
- Echo in the Wind
- Crescent Dunes
- Bromeliad
- A familiar room
- Left to bloom
- Deeper
- Eld unknown
- Endless
- Featherfall
- Komorebi
- Pokopoko
- Puzzlebox
- Watcher
- Yakusoku
- Beinning 2
- Floating trees
- Moog city 2
- Mutation
- Below and Above
- Broken Clocks
- Fireflies
- Lilypad
- O's piano
## ⚖️Copyright and Reuploads
You must own or have the necessary licenses, rights, consents, and permissions to store, share, and distribute the Content that is uploaded under your Modrinth account.

Content may not be directly reuploaded from another source without explicit permission from the original author. If explicit permission has been granted, or it is a license-abiding "fork", this restriction does not apply. We define "forks" as modified copies of a project which have diverged substantially from the original project.
